Broke my 4 year olds heart. Netflix has been my family’s go-to for streaming, and I’m thankful for the content and user experience. But I’m deeply disappointed in the forced definition of a “household” and constant price increases. We are one family under two roofs, raising kids together, sharing bills, and supporting each other. Because we don’t fit the narrow definition of “household,” we’re forced to pay more—money that could go toward our children. This feels like profit over people.
